As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. August Blues Depress Volatility but Rates Hold Strong - An uneventful fortnight in terms of cargo flow has reduced near-term activity, contributing to a decline in spot rate volatility .
